\tzpentry{ID4137}{Transfer Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4137 introduces Transfer Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \\mathcal{T}_{\\pi,\\phi_c}[s] := \\mathrm{sgn}!\\left(\\pi(s-1)-\\phi_c\\right), \\end{equation}
